name: Gmail
description: Free web-based email service from Google, part of Google Workspace.

years.notes: Flat red envelope mark introduced with Gmail's 2013 refresh, used through October 2020. Front face in Google red (#DB4437), inner liner in light gray, with subtle gradient highlights on the back paper. Source viewBox 0 0 12031.384 8750.098 wrapped in a 24x24 scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform). Decorative drop-shadow blur and dark overlay layers stripped.

October 2020 rebrand introduced with Google Workspace. The envelope is reduced to a stylized 'M' assembled from five colored facets using the four Google brand colors plus a dark red (#C5221F) overlap shadow. Source viewBox 52 42 88 66 wrapped in a 24x24 scale group (baked at build via SVGO convertTransform).

2026 Workspace refresh — envelope re-imagined as two solid side panels (red left, green→blue gradient right) bridged by an M-shaped flap stroked with a yellow→red→pink linear gradient. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the community Figma file 'New Google Workspace Icons 2026', exported via the Figma Desktop Bridge as a 24×24 SVG_STRING; two linear gradients preserved.
